payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Upright table lamp with a warm beige/tan tapered fabric shade trimmed with darker piping above a dark twisted wood (wood-finish) sculpted pedestal base; lamp appears lit and is centered and fully visible in the narrow portrait crop, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
